new_value: Completed per spec: added explicit 0xFFFFFFFF delta example with pseudocode (curr=0 last=0xFFFFFFFFU => delta=1), integrated time-provider epoch_floor ref in SFN modulo section (§2a.4.1), cleaned duplicate para. Performed 4 chunks; after each ran 3 codereview passes filing 12+ codereview beads (P2 findings addressed in follow-on chunks; final 3 passes P3/P4 only). No P0-P2 remain. Matches codereview-pass3-robustness-1 requirements.
